read: The top-k=512 number used in sparse-attention backward probes is LightningIndexer compressed-KV top-k, not MoE router top-k. MoE router top-k is 6 experts per token and belongs to a separate dispatch/expert-VJP/combine decomposition.

formula.compressed_groups: G_c = S / compress_ratio for compressed sparse attention layers

layers.read: This is the hard compressed dKV writeback case. The query-major kernel keeps QK/probability/dQ relatively cheap, but emits about 805M scalar atomic-add elements into the compressed shared-KV gradient bank at H64/D512. The 512 is attention compressed-group top-k, not MoE top-k.

The configured LI cap is still 512, but S4096/CR128 leaves only 32 compressed groups, so actual compressed top-k is 32. This layer is much smaller than layer 2 and should not be used to explain the topk512 dKV wall.

sasg_stage_mapping.gather: Load selected local and compressed K/V plus q/dO tiles.
sasg_stage_mapping.process: Softmax row terms and grad-logit correction.
sasg_stage_mapping.cube345: Compute dQ and dKV contribution math.
sasg_stage_mapping.scatter: ScatterAdd dK/dV into local and compressed KV gradient banks. The measured compressed dKV atomic accumulation wall belongs here, even though its values are produced by the preceding cube stage.

decomposition_scope: MORI dispatch tokens to expert owners
AITER/MoE forward or saved/recomputed expert intermediates
owner-rank expert VJP: W2 dgrad, SwiGLU backward, W1/W3 wgrad, xgrad/reduce
moe_router.read: MoE top-k=6 is unrelated to attention LI top-k=512. Its bottleneck is routed expert training VJP plus return skew/overlap at EP4/EP8, not compressed KV dKV atomic accumulation.

do: Call layer-2 sparse attention probes 'LI compressed-KV topk512' or 'attention topk512'.
Call MoE probes 'router topk6' or 'expert topk6'.
Report layer 2 and layer 3 attention separately because CR4 and CR128 produce different actual top-k and atomic volumes.
Treat the dKV atomic accumulation number as a sparse-attention ScatterAdd/writeback cost, not a MoE dispatch/combine cost.
dont: Do not compare attention topk512 directly to MoE topk6.
Do not use layer-3 topk32 evidence to claim layer-2 topk512 is solved.
Do not call the compressed dKV atomic wall a dense GEMM or MoE grouped-GEMM issue.

next_profile_cut.name: s4096_dsv4_full_decomposition_with_distinct_attention_and_moe_topk_domains
next_profile_cut.purpose: Break the full 4-layer/EP4/EP8 run into additive or near-additive forward/backward buckets without mixing attention LI top-k and MoE router top-k.
required_buckets: forward sparse attention layer 2 CR4 local128+compressed512
forward sparse attention layer 3 CR128 local128+compressed32
backward sparse attention layer 2 dQ/local dKV/compressed dKV/LI/compressor
backward sparse attention layer 3 dQ/local dKV/compressed dKV/LI/compressor
backward MoE router-topk6 owner VJP, return/combine, and skew wait
next_profile_cut.kernel_rewrite_target: Layer-2 sparse-attention compressed dKV ScatterAdd/writeback path: preserve query-major QK/probability/dQ reuse, but replace the current many-to-one global atomic writeback with a fused streaming/tile-local or MFMA-friendly segmented accumulation that does not materialize [B,H,S,K] scores/probs.
